stemHtml: A pilot who has just been promoted to captain is flying with a much older copilot with much more total flight time and experience on type. Which of the following problems can occur?

options.a: There is the risk of a mismatch of role and status.
options.b: The cockpit authority gradient may be too steep.
options.c: The captain may develop a feeling of invulnerability.
options.d: The crew may decide to divert from SOPs.
